allow: PowerShell(cd C:\\Users\\benja\\applications\\grade; $loginResp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"username":"test","password":"test"}' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($loginResp.token\) { $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $\($loginResp.token\)" }; $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/export/pdf" -Headers $headers -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Status: $\($resp.StatusCode\)  ContentType: $\($resp.Headers['Content-Type']\)  Size: $\($resp.Content.Length\) bytes" } else { "Login failed or no test user — testing route existence only"; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/export/pdf" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object StatusCode })
